# Vendored DokuWiki formatting syntax

`spec.txt` is the DokuWiki **Formatting Syntax** page — the canonical description
of DokuWiki's markup, published at <https://www.dokuwiki.org/wiki:syntax> and
shipped with every DokuWiki install as `data/pages/wiki/syntax.txt`. It is
authored by Andreas Gohr and the DokuWiki community. As published on the
documentation wiki it is licensed under
[Creative Commons CC-BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/);
as bundled in the distribution it falls under the project's GNU GPL v2 (see
`LICENSE`).

The copy here is pinned to DokuWiki release `release-2025-05-14b` ("Librarian";
see `VERSION`) and was taken verbatim from that tag in the official source
repository (`dokuwiki/dokuwiki`), which serves the exact bytes the wiki publishes
and is reachable for reproducible, offline re-fetching.

It is vendored as a public format specification — an allowed source of truth for
this clean-room implementation. The reader is built from this documented syntax;
expected conversion output for the differential tests is regenerated by the
pinned oracle binary, never copied from any external implementation.

Refresh or re-pin with `tools/fetch-dokuwiki-spec.sh` (edit `SPEC_VERSION` to
bump).
